title: Send Emails With Postmark
excerpt: description: This tutorial explains how to send transactional emails from Workers using Postmark. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this tutorial, you will learn how to send transactional emails from Workers using [Postmark ↗](https://postmarkapp.com/). At the end of this tutorial, you’ll be able to: * Sign up and add a Cloudflare domain to Postmark.
